name: Eggplant Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the olive oil with oregano, basil, salt, and pepper.
2. Brush the mixture onto both sides of the eggplant and zucchini slices.
3. Lay the eggplant and zucchini slices in single layers on baking sheets.
4. Broil 2 inches from the heat for 4-5 minutes or until cooked. Turn the slices and brush with oil, then broil for another 4-5 minutes on the other side. Remove from oven.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Place half the eggplant slices in a wide, shallow baking dish.
7. Add half the zucchini slices, followed by half of the mozzarella, ricotta, spaghetti sauce, fennel seed, and Parmesan.
8. Repeat layering with remaining ingredients.
9. Cover and bake for 20-25 minutes or until hot and bubbly. The lasagna may be made ahead several days or frozen, defrosted, and reheated.
